title: Claude Fable 5 Just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates Claude Fable 5's capabilities for website design generation compared to Opus 4.8 across three difficulty levels. The video shows Fable 5 producing competitive or superior results at lower token costs, focusing on practical applications from one-shot tests to extracting design patterns and rebuilding from blueprints.
writeup: Jack Roberts tests Claude Fable 5 against Opus 4.8 on website design generation across three difficulty levels. The comparison spans one-shot generation, extracting design patterns, and rebuilding sites from blueprints. The takeaway: Fable 5 matches or beats Opus 4.8 on these design tasks while using fewer tokens, which lowers the cost of practical generation work.
